title: narcissus poeticus var. ornatus
intro: Narcissus poeticus var. ornatus, also known as the Poet's Narcissus or Jonquil, is a fragrant and elegant variety of daffodil that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems, respiratory issues, and as an antispasmodic to relieve muscle cramps and spasms. The medicinal properties of Narcissus poeticus var. ornatus are attributed to its content of alkaloids, including galantamine and lycorine, which have been shown to have potential health benefits such as improving cognitive function and reducing inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to alleviate various health issues, and its fragrance is also used in perfumes and aromatherapy.
